sources.MIDWEATHER_FINGERPRINT_GATE_FREEZE.json: LC322 freeze (commit 6ca6c28); structure mirrored for LC79
sources.doctor/adversarial/lc79_ground_truth.py: Brute force oracle for LC79 Word Search
sources.data/midweather_fingerprint_lc79_probe_i: 30 probes, 5 per axis, 6 fingerprint axes (path_finding, visited_tracking, boundary, recursion_depth, backtracking, exhaustive_search)

field_provenance.frozen_files: ALL SHA256s computed. self-SHA for MIDWEATHER_FINGERPRINT_GATE_LC79_FREEZE.json = PENDING_SELF_REFERENCE_AT_FREEZE_TIME (frozen-file self-reference is exempt from the SHAs-required check by convention; the validator accepts the placeholder).
field_provenance.observation_budget.observed_probe_ids: PATCHED FROM data/midweather_fingerprint_lc79_probe_index.json — 15 probe IDs at odd within-axis positions
field_provenance.observation_budget.target_probe_ids: PATCHED FROM data/midweather_fingerprint_lc79_probe_index.json — 15 probe IDs at even within-axis positions
field_provenance.decision_spec.*: Mirrors LC322 ACCEPT_REJECT_SPEC; failure_threshold=0.05, minimum_accept_rate=0.2 (carried forward from LC322)

observation_budget.unit: one solver execution on one probe_id

decision_spec.name: ACCEPT_REJECT
decision_spec.policy_input: K observations from O_obs including fingerprint_context
decision_spec.policy_output: one action from action_space per solver
decision_spec.utility_function: Minimize cost-weighted decision_loss = wrong_accept_cost * wrong_accepts + wrong_reject_cost * wrong_rejects.
decision_spec.success_rule: C must have strictly lower decision_loss than every same-information baseline (B0-B6), satisfy minimum_accept_rate, and not be degenerate.

success_rule: C must strictly beat every same-observation baseline (B0-B6) on decision_loss. Ties are FAIL.
